headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Philip Morris International (PM) After Strong Multi‑Year Share Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Philip Morris International at around US$170.99 is offering fair value or asking too much, this breakdown will help you size up the stock with a clear, valuation focused lens. The stock closed at US$170.99, with returns of 1.1% over the last week, 6.6% over the last month, 6.7% year to date, 7.4% over the past year, 105.7% over three years and 122.3% over five years. This naturally raises questions about what is already reflected in the price. Recent coverage...
